title: Three people die in mass fans celebrations in Mexico City after World Cup victory
summary_full: Three people have died from suffocation More than a million people gathered in Mexico CityThree people died ⁠from suffocation as thousands of fans crowded Mexico City streets during World Cup celebrations, the capital’s health secretariat ⁠said in the early ⁠hours ​of Wednesday.The deaths occurred near the Angel of Independence landmark, where thousands of fans had gathered to ⁠celebrate Mexico’s 2-0 victory over Ecuador in the last 32.
